nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy. Low around 57, with temperatures rising to around 61 overnight. East wind around 3 mph.

nws.name: Thursday
nws.detailedForecast: Showers and thunderstorms likely. Some of the storms could be severe. Partly sunny. High near 87, with temperatures falling to around 81 in the afternoon. East wind 5 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.

nws.name: Thursday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 3am. Some of the storms could be severe. Mostly cloudy. Low around 60, with temperatures rising to around 62 overnight. East wind 3 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%. New rainfall amounts between a half and three quarters of an inch possible.

nws.name: Friday
nws.shortForecast: Partly Sunny then Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms after 1pm. Partly sunny, with a high near 84. East wind 3 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 40%.

nws.name: Friday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 10pm, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 60. Northeast wind 3 to 7 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws.name: Independence Day
nws.shortForecast: Chance Rain Showers then Mostly Sunny
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers before 7am. Mostly sunny, with a high near 86. Northwest wind around 5 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws.name: Saturday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Mostly clear, with a low around 62. East wind around 6 mph.

nws.name: Sunday
nws.detailedForecast: Sunny, with a high near 93. South wind 5 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph.

nws.name: Sunday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms after 7pm. Mostly clear, with a low around 67. South wind 8 to 14 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph.

nws.name: Monday
nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Rain Showers then Mostly Sunny
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 7am. Mostly sunny, with a high near 91. Southeast wind 7 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph.

nws.name: Monday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms after 7pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 64. East wind around 10 mph.

nws.name: Tuesday
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly sunny, with a high near 88. East wind 9 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph.

nws.name: Tuesday Night
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 1am, then a chance of showers and thunderstorms. Partly cloudy, with a low around 64. East wind 8 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 18 mph.

nws.name: Wednesday
nws.shortForecast: Chance Showers And Thunderstorms then Slight Chance Showers And Thunderstorms
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms before 7am, then a slight chance of showers and thunderstorms. Mostly sunny, with a high near 88.
